title: Lose Time, Lose Life
description: Lose Time, Lose Life — Every second counts: break blocks to gain time, take damage to lose it, and if the timer hits zero, you die instantly!
body:
⏱ Lose Time, Lose Life — A fast-paced survival challenge for Minecraft Fabric!

Every player starts with 100 seconds. Each second, the timer ticks down.  
If it hits zero, you're instantly killed and reset to 100 seconds!

🏗️ Gain Time:
- +3 seconds for breaking any block

💀 Lose Time:
- -5 seconds whenever you take damage

⚰️ If your timer runs out, you die instantly!

This mod turns normal Minecraft into a constant race against the clock.
Can you keep your time alive long enough to survive the night?

✅ Fabric 1.20 - 1.21 compatible  
✅ Lightweight — no dependencies required  
✅ Works in singleplayer and on servers


Warning:
If you play this Mod on Social Media please link [my youtube channel](https://youtube.com/@timexo_official?si=SP6tHFWOdI_eucqQ).
